memberdef.argsstring: (const Coordinate2D< double > &point, const std::vector< Coordinate2D< double > > &ring)
memberdef.name: point_in_ring

memberdef.argsstring: (std::vector< Coordinate2D< double > > &ring, const Extent2D &extent, double tolerance)
memberdef.name: snap_ring_to_extent

memberdef.argsstring: (const Coordinate2D< double > &a1, const Coordinate2D< double > &a2, const Coordinate2D< double > &b1, const Coordinate2D< double > &b2, Coordinate2D< double > &out)
memberdef.name: segment_intersection

memberdef.argsstring: (const Coordinate2D< double > &from, const Coordinate2D< double > &to, const Coordinate2D< double > &point)
memberdef.name: is_left_of

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< Coordinate2D< double > > &subject, const std::vector< Coordinate2D< double > > &clip)
memberdef.name: intersect_polygons
